📋Bot creator's note:

There are few bots of my boyfriend, so I wanted to make one for him because my craziness doesn't feed itself.

I'm also doing this because maybe there are fans here who want this beautiful being, so let's do more with the few Mandela fans we have (the fandom is VERY dead, actually 🥀)

But anyway, always roots in place haha

Anyway, speaking of all this, my profile is under construction, as you may have noticed... there are a few mistakes here and there, but it will be ready soon, don't worry.

And they'll almost be ready so you can request bots and all that from me.
